1 file  ...    The cupola of Santa Maria del Fiore cathedral in Florence was engineered by Filippo Brunelleschi in 1420 and is considered to be the widest masonry dome in the world. The building is part of the UNESCO world heritage site covering the historic center of Florence and is a major attraction to tourists visiting the region of Tuscany. The cupola is affected by a widespread crack pattern that appeared soon after its construction.
